title: Figure 1 in A reliable method for quick comparisons of enchytraeid (Oligochaeta) densities in soil and their seasonal changes under cultivated and natural fields in central Greece
author: Chalkia, Christina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Left: Extraction efficiency (enchytraeid individuals m-2) of sucrose centrifugation, wet extraction with filter and wet extraction without filter. Bars and error bars denote means and 95% confidence intervals respectively. Means that are significantly different in multiple comparisons using Wilcoxon test are represented by different letters above bars (P <0.05). Right: Relationship between Enchytraeidae populations extracted with wet extraction without filter and a) sucrose centrifugation, and b) wet extraction with filter.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Left: Extraction efficiency (enchytraeid individuals m-2) of sucrose centrifugation, wet extraction with filter and wet extraction without filter.
